nodes.name: Three-striped hemispingus
nodes.summary: Three-striped hemispingus（Microspingus trifasciatus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Three-striped hemispingus。

nodes.name: Three-striped hemispingus
nodes.summary: The three-striped hemispingus (Microspingus trifasciatus) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Bolivia and Peru. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References
nodes.shortSummary: The three-striped hemispingus (Microspingus trifasciatus) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Bolivia and Peru.

nodes.name: Microspingus
nodes.summary: Microspingus（Microspingus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联8种鸟类，如Plain-tailed warbling finch、Rusty-browed warbling finch、Buff-throated warbling finch等8种鸟类。
